featureName: Inline Upgrade UX — Quantity Selector in UpgradeModal
description: Replace the tooltip-only gating on 'Ajouter un lot' with a direct UpgradeModal trigger. Enhance the UpgradeModal with a quantity selector (not just +1), live price preview, and confirmation dialog connected to Stripe. After upgrade, subscription refreshes and lot creation unlocks.

userStories.title: Add quantity selector to UpgradeModal
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire at the lot limit, I want to choose how many additional lots to add so that I can upgrade to my exact need in one step.
acceptanceCriteria: Dynamic preview: getUpgradePreview(additionalLots) updates on quantity change
Mode A (card saved): upgradeSubscription(additionalLots) with selected quantity
Mode B (no card): createCheckoutSessionAction({ quantity: currentLots + additionalLots })
Price per lot shown (e.g. '5 lots x 50EUR HT/an = 250EUR HT/an')
Debounce preview API calls (300ms) to avoid spam
userStories.notes: Stepper [-][N][+] with debounced preview (300ms), dual mode A/B quantity support, subscribedLots prop added

userStories.title: Make lot buttons trigger UpgradeModal instead of disabled+tooltip
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire at the lot limit, I want the 'Ajouter un lot' button to directly open the upgrade modal so that I can upgrade without navigating to billing.
acceptanceCriteria: BuildingInfoCard: button NOT disabled at limit — fires onAddLot which parent routes to modal
BuildingInfoCard: visual indicator when at limit (orange/amber style, 'Ajouter un lot (upgrade)' text or badge)
BuildingLotsStepV2 empty state button: same behavior (clickable, routes to modal)
Building detail page 'Ajouter un lot' dropdown: opens modal instead of navigating
Tooltip removed — replaced by direct action
userStories.notes: Button always clickable, amber style at limit, TrendingUp icon, tooltip removed. Building detail page already wired.

userStories.title: Wire all form locations + auto-refresh after upgrade
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the subscription to refresh automatically after a successful upgrade so that I can immediately add lots.
acceptanceCriteria: Building creation form: after modal upgrade complete, refreshSubscription() called, addLot re-enabled
No page reload needed — React state updates
userStories.notes: All 4 locations already had UpgradeModal + refreshSubscription wired. Added subscribedLots prop to all.
